theme: Smallest circuit computing a regular predicate
title: Gate Diet: the Smallest Circuit for a Badge Predicate
strategies: naive sum-of-products: one independent product term per accepted n-bit string, fresh NOT gate per 0-bit per string, no sharing of any kind (trivial, == checker baseline)
textbook two-level minimization: enumerate accepted strings, Quine-McCluskey prime implicants + essential primes + greedy set cover, shared input negations only (greedy)
automaton-state-sharing circuit: subset construction with forward-reachable/backward-live trim, backward per-position Boolean DP, global hash-consing CSE with constant folding (strong)
deeper multi-level synthesis: XOR/adder structure for counting predicates, BDD-style complemented-edge sharing, functional decomposition, SAT-based exact minimization (open ceiling, uncovered)
